//: Generic, portable IntelliSense config — NO absolute paths. Vulkan is found via the VULKAN_SDK
//2: environment variable the SDK exports (same var CMake's find_package(Vulkan) uses), so the
//3: editor resolves whatever Vulkan version you have installed (e.g. 1.4) on its own. The build's

configurations.name: cheatah-gpu
configurations.//cc: build/vk compiles gpu/vulkan/commands.hpp against the auto-discovered (newest) SDK, so
configurations.//cc2: IntelliSense resolves every VK_VERSION block. Populate it once with: scripts/vulkan_gate.sh
configurations.//cc3: (or cmake -B build/vk -DCHEATAH_GPU_BUILD_VULKAN=ON). Falls back to VULKAN_SDK above.
